emergency_routing_rules.fallback: If both fail, leave a message and tell the customer we'll call back within the hour

call_transfer_rules.what_to_say_if_transfer_fails: If both fail, leave a message and tell the customer we'll call back within the hour
call_transfer_rules.transfer_announcement: You are being connected to our team now.

integration_constraints: never create jobs for sprinkler or fire suppression work
never schedule any job type called "Chimney Sweep" — we trialed it and pulled out
ServiceTitan constraint — no sprinkler or fire suppression jobs
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, the agent confirms whether the issue is an emergency. Emergency calls are immediately routed to on-call staff. Non-emergency calls receive a message-taking flow with a next-business-day callback promise.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours (Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday 07:00–18:00 New_York), calls are answered and routed to the main office or scheduling desk. If transfer fails, a message is taken and callback is promised.
